title: DigiLights
description: Simple colored lights for your building needs.
body:
DigiLights provides simple colored lights for your builds. Cheap, simple crafting recipes, and a wide variety of colors and styles.

To start, make a white lamp:

![White Lamp recipe: glass, redstone dust, glowstone dust.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19dde71ef618cc0e02923c23345bcaf2ee6c68c8.png)

White Lamp recipe: glass, redstone dust, glowstone dust.

(See the gallery for all the available blocks.)

To make a lamp smooth, "sand" it with sand!

To un-smooth a lamp, beat it with rocks! (Craft it with a cobblestone.)

To invert a lamp, just put it back in the crafting table.

To make a blackbody/color temperature lamp, craft a White Lamp with an Iron Nugget.

To warm a blackbody lamp, add up to 8 torches with it in a crafting table (down to 2000K)

To cool a blackbody lamp, add up to 8 snowballs with it (up to 10000K)

 

This is version 1.0, and was made for a private SMP. More is planned in the future!
